description:
Bassrao, known as the Violent Pokémon, is a green and black-colored fish. It has two forms whose main difference is a colored stripe, and the player encounters one form more commonly depending on the game version; red-striped Basculin is more common in Black, while the blue-striped variety is more common in White.
Game Informer`s Jeff Marchiafava praised its categorization as the "Hostile Pokémon", stating, "Now here`s a category I can get behind". They criticized its abilities for contradicting each other.
name: Bassrao
